doctrine: Candidates must come from a market-wide screen first, hand-curation second. A radar that only scores a hand-picked watchlist is a mirror, not an instrument. NAVN ran $8 to $28 outside the old universe — that class of miss is what this framework exists to prevent.
refresh_instruction: Refresh via Robinhood MCP: run_scan on each scan_id, save results to data/discovery/scan-track-{a,b}.json with fetched_at.

track_a_candidates.name: Oracle
track_a_candidates.why: RSI 29.5 with 65.8% GM / 33.3% OM — quality marked down, business intact pending XBRL check
track_a_candidates.next_gate: Verify revenue not declining (XBRL) + one evidence signal (insider/backlog/re-accel), then promote to scanner-universe with moat research
